questions.q: Making headlines on May 3, 2026, President Trump officially withdrew the stalled Surgeon General nomination of Dr. Casey Means and announced which medical contributor as her replacement?

In an expanded access ruling covered on May 3, 2026, the FDA allowed 'compassionate use' of the experimental drug daraxonrasib to treat which deadly disease, famously affecting former Senator Ben Sasse?
In early May 2026, the US FDA proposed excluding the active ingredients for Wegovy and Zepbound from its 503B bulks list, aiming to restrict what practice?
options: Importation of generic medicines from Canada

questions.q: As of May 2026, health authorities in Hong Kong have begun heavily enforcing a new public law that completely bans which of the following activities in public spaces?
options: Selling fast food within business districts

questions.q: In a viral health story peaking on May 3, 2026, a 16-year-old athlete who believed his shortness of breath was simply due to football practice was actually diagnosed with what rare condition?
